benchmark_panel.label: Crypto Trading Intelligence
benchmark_panel.description: Crypto strategy evaluation, execution discipline, and market-adaptive trading workflows.
benchmark_panel.rationale: Existing mature benchmark chip with clear strategy loops and durable market signal.

benchmark_panel.label: Startup YC Intelligence
benchmark_panel.description: Founder decision support around startup formation, validation, growth, and fundraising.
benchmark_panel.rationale: Existing benchmark chip for startup specialization and repeated founder workflow mastery.

benchmark_panel.label: AI Coding Workflow
benchmark_panel.description: Prompt-to-code workflow acceleration, codebase navigation, and developer throughput improvement.
benchmark_panel.rationale: Strong developer workflow benchmark with clear tooling demand and visible ecosystem pull.

benchmark_panel.label: MCP Server Development
benchmark_panel.description: MCP server scaffolding, packaging, testing, and integration workflows for developers.
benchmark_panel.rationale: High-fit benchmark for protocol-native developer tooling in the current ecosystem.

benchmark_panel.label: AI Agent Architecture
benchmark_panel.description: Agent patterns, tool selection, prompt engineering, evaluation frameworks.
benchmark_panel.rationale: AI agents are #1 category on Product Hunt 2026. MCP has 10,000+ servers.

discovered_opportunities.label: Security Control Crosswalk Copilot
discovered_opportunities.description: Builds and maintains a reusable control-and-evidence crosswalk across SOC 2, ISO 27001, HIPAA, and similar frameworks.
discovered_opportunities.rationale: Hyperproof says teams repeat administrative work when they map frameworks one at a time and re-collect evidence, while ControlMap and practitioner discussion describe one control mapped to many frameworks with evidence reuse as the operational win.

candidate_context.specialization_surface: mapping one internal control baseline to multiple external framework requirements
candidate_context.mastery_surface: reducing repeated evidence collection by learning reusable control crosswalks and evidence mappings
candidate_context.user_value_loop: ingest a new framework request, map it to the control baseline, attach reusable evidence, and refine the crosswalk after auditor or customer review

discovered_opportunities.label: Vendor Assertion Evidence Verifier
discovered_opportunities.description: Requests, validates, and tracks supporting artifacts behind vendor questionnaire claims for high-risk reviews.
discovered_opportunities.rationale: UpGuard and Safe Security both describe repetitive questionnaires, inconsistent responses, and verification difficulty as core TPRM bottlenecks, and Safe Security explicitly recommends requesting recent supporting artifacts for critical control assertions instead of trusting questionnaire answers alone.

candidate_context.specialization_surface: turning self-reported questionnaire answers into verified evidence packets for vendor risk teams
candidate_context.mastery_surface: learning which artifact types, freshness windows, and follow-ups actually resolve high-risk vendor assertions
candidate_context.user_value_loop: parse vendor answers, request supporting evidence, verify artifact freshness and scope, and update the vendor evidence profile for future reviews

discovered_opportunities.label: Trust Center Gap Copilot
discovered_opportunities.description: Prepares the exact missing documents, report access workflows, and follow-up answers needed when a trust center does not fully satisfy a customer security review.
discovered_opportunities.rationale: Cyberday positions trust centers as a way to cut repetitive security reviews, and practitioners still report that customers ask for the same evidence in different formats, leaving a recurring gap-handling layer after the trust center is in place.

candidate_context.specialization_surface: closing the gap between reusable trust-center content and bespoke customer security review asks
candidate_context.mastery_surface: learning which trust-center gaps recur and how to answer them with minimal manual pre-sales and security effort
candidate_context.user_value_loop: detect repeated customer asks, point to existing trust-center assets, package missing evidence, and update reusable trust-center content after each review

discovered_opportunities.label: Shared Responsibility Matrix Copilot
discovered_opportunities.description: Builds and maintains customer-specific shared responsibility matrices for cloud, managed security, and compliance reviews.
discovered_opportunities.rationale: Summit 7, KTL Solutions, and the Cloud Security Alliance all describe shared-responsibility matrices as a recurring requirement in cloud compliance work, where teams must repeatedly clarify which party owns which control and update that mapping as the engagement changes.

candidate_context.specialization_surface: mapping provider-versus-customer ownership for security controls in review and audit contexts
candidate_context.mastery_surface: learning recurring responsibility splits, evidence needs, and customer misunderstandings across shared-control reviews
candidate_context.user_value_loop: ingest the service boundary, generate the control ownership matrix, attach supporting rationale, and refine the matrix after each customer or auditor challenge

discovered_opportunities.label: Compensating Control Justification Copilot
discovered_opportunities.description: Documents, packages, and maintains auditor-ready compensating control narratives when standard controls cannot be met directly.
discovered_opportunities.rationale: Fortinet describes compensating controls as context-specific alternatives that need clear rationale, validation, and ongoing review, while Security Info Watch notes that teams rely on them heavily but often fail to verify they still mitigate the intended risk.

candidate_context.specialization_surface: turning security gaps into documented compensating-control packages with rationale, evidence, and review trails
candidate_context.mastery_surface: learning which alternative safeguards, risk arguments, and review cadences actually satisfy auditors and customer reviewers
candidate_context.user_value_loop: detect a control gap, draft the compensating-control package, attach validation evidence, and update the justification after review or environmental change

discovered_opportunities.label: Vendor Reassessment Delta Copilot
discovered_opportunities.description: Tracks what changed between vendor security reviews, identifies stale artifacts, and prepares the delta package for reassessment.
discovered_opportunities.rationale: SAFE’s questionnaire and TPRM guidance says high-risk vendors need periodic reassessment, recent supporting artifacts, and trigger-based review after major changes, which creates a recurring delta-analysis workflow rather than a one-time questionnaire task.

candidate_context.specialization_surface: comparing a new vendor reassessment against the prior evidence set, scores, and control assertions
candidate_context.mastery_surface: learning which vendor changes, artifact ages, and reassessment triggers actually matter for ongoing third-party risk decisions
candidate_context.user_value_loop: ingest prior assessment data, detect material changes or stale evidence, request the smallest missing delta set, and update the vendor review baseline after each reassessment

discovered_opportunities.label: Questionnaire Answer Drift Copilot
discovered_opportunities.description: Maintains a governed answer library for security questionnaires and flags which prior answers need revision when policies, controls, or evidence change.
discovered_opportunities.rationale: Drata says repeated questionnaires create version-control chaos and require updating many prior answers when policies change, while Vanta documents a shared knowledge base powering questionnaire automation and Trust Center resources as the source material that must stay current.

candidate_context.specialization_surface: tracking answer-library drift across repeated customer security questionnaires
candidate_context.mastery_surface: learning which policy, control, and evidence changes force answer updates, approval refreshes, or downstream questionnaire edits
candidate_context.user_value_loop: monitor source-of-truth changes, detect affected approved answers, prepare revised wording and evidence references, and update the answer library after review

discovered_opportunities.label: Security Review Deflection Copilot
discovered_opportunities.description: Decides whether a prospect or customer security request can be deflected with existing trust materials or needs a custom follow-up package.
discovered_opportunities.rationale: Vanta claims Trust Center can deflect a large share of reviews and speed the rest, its Trust Center FAQ says proactive sharing can avoid questionnaires altogether, and Drata positions trust-center AI search as the response layer that absorbs repeated one-off security questions.

candidate_context.specialization_surface: classifying security review requests into trust-center-resolvable versus custom-response work
candidate_context.mastery_surface: learning which request patterns can be safely deflected with reusable trust assets and which requests consistently require bespoke follow-up
candidate_context.user_value_loop: ingest the customer ask, match it against approved trust resources and prior answers, recommend a deflection path or custom packet, and improve the playbook based on what resolved the review

discovered_opportunities.label: Trust Document Access Workflow Copilot
discovered_opportunities.description: Runs the gated workflow for sharing sensitive security documents, including NDA checks, business-email verification, access approvals, and request follow-up.
discovered_opportunities.rationale: Drata describes configurable trust-center access with NDAs and verified business emails, Vanta documents admin approval and NDA workflows around sensitive documentation, and customer stories position this gated sharing as part of the recurring trust process rather than a one-off task.

candidate_context.specialization_surface: managing access-controlled distribution of SOC reports, policies, and other sensitive trust-center documents
candidate_context.mastery_surface: learning which access rules, requester attributes, and escalation patterns safely unblock reviews without oversharing sensitive materials
candidate_context.user_value_loop: evaluate an access request, enforce NDA and requester checks, grant or deny document access, and update the access playbook after each review cycle

shocks.label: Breakout Tool Launch
shocks.description: A tool goes viral and creates massive awareness for the domain.

shocks.label: Free Open Source Model Drop
shocks.description: Major open source AI model released free, lowers barrier to entry.

shocks.label: Market Crash
shocks.description: Broad market downturn reduces investment appetite.

properties.rationale: Cyberday positions trust centers as a way to cut repetitive security reviews, and practitioners still report that customers ask for the same evidence in different formats, leaving a recurring gap-handling layer after the trust center is in place.

properties.description: Builds and maintains a reusable control-and-evidence crosswalk across SOC 2, ISO 27001, HIPAA, and similar frameworks.
properties.rationale: Hyperproof says teams repeat administrative work when they map frameworks one at a time and re-collect evidence, while ControlMap and practitioner discussion describe one control mapped to many frameworks with evidence reuse as the operational win.

properties.description: Builds and maintains customer-specific shared responsibility matrices for cloud, managed security, and compliance reviews.
properties.rationale: Summit 7, KTL Solutions, and the Cloud Security Alliance all describe shared-responsibility matrices as a recurring requirement in cloud compliance work, where teams must repeatedly clarify which party owns which control and update that mapping as the engagement changes.

properties.description: Decides whether a prospect or customer security request can be deflected with existing trust materials or needs a custom follow-up package.
properties.rationale: Vanta claims Trust Center can deflect a large share of reviews and speed the rest, its Trust Center FAQ says proactive sharing can avoid questionnaires altogether, and Drata positions trust-center AI search as the response layer that absorbs repeated one-off security questions.

properties.description: Documents, packages, and maintains auditor-ready compensating control narratives when standard controls cannot be met directly.
properties.rationale: Fortinet describes compensating controls as context-specific alternatives that need clear rationale, validation, and ongoing review, while Security Info Watch notes that teams rely on them heavily but often fail to verify they still mitigate the intended risk.

properties.description: Requests, validates, and tracks supporting artifacts behind vendor questionnaire claims for high-risk reviews.
properties.rationale: UpGuard and Safe Security both describe repetitive questionnaires, inconsistent responses, and verification difficulty as core TPRM bottlenecks, and Safe Security explicitly recommends requesting recent supporting artifacts for critical control assertions instead of trusting questionnaire answers alone.

governance_note: Discovered candidates use conservative inferred priors. Hybrid specs are exploratory_frontier and must not auto-promote benchmark membership, including proposed benchmark members and promotion-review candidates.
